messages.speaker: code
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="code", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Implement API slice
SCOPE: src/auth/api/login.ts
OUT_OF_SCOPE: tests
OWNERSHIP: src/auth/api/login.ts
DEPENDENCIES: shared validation helpers
STEPS: implement endpoint logic
DELIVERABLES: updated API file
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: endpoint returns JWT on valid credentials
NON-NEGOTIABLE: no test edits
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after backend slice")

Task(subagent_type="code", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Implement regression tests
SCOPE: tests/auth/api/login.test.ts
OUT_OF_SCOPE: production code
OWNERSHIP: tests/auth/api/login.test.ts
DEPENDENCIES: src/auth/api/login.ts
STEPS: add success and failure coverage
DELIVERABLES: updated API tests
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: endpoint is covered by regression tests
NON-NEGOTIABLE: keep source files untouched
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after tests are prepared")
